description_long: This is a red and white sneaker with a classic low-top silhouette, featuring a canvas upper and a white rubber sole. The shoe displays a distinctive white side stripe, characteristic of Vans Old Skool shoes, and white stitching along the seams. The outsole is a light brown gum color with a waffle tread pattern, showing some signs of wear and dirt. The heel area has a white patch with a red logo, and the interior is lined with a light-colored material. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with white eyelets and laces. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style shoe that has been lightly used.
description: A red and white low-top sneaker with a white side stripe, gum waffle sole, and standard criss-cross lacing, showing light wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red canvas upper, white side stripe, and white laces, with some wear visible near the heel.
description_view_1: Profile view highlighting the white side stripe, full white midsole, and the shoe's overall slim silhouette.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the light brown gum sole with a waffle tread pattern and some dirt marks.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the white heel patch with a red logo and the transition from the gum sole to the red upper.
attribute_logo: Red rectangular logo on the heel patch, white text
